summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Two security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, one superseded web_fetch PR is planned for closeout against the already-merged canonical fix, and the remaining PRs are kept open as independent maintainer-review items.

actions.reason: Distinct PR with active review context; keep it open and independent of this inventory shard.
Security-boundary/provider-auth work is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Focused non-security availability fix with contributor follow-up; keep open as an independent maintainer-review PR.
Distinct plugin/session-state fix, not a duplicate or closeout candidate in this mixed inventory shard.
SSH tunneling plus auth/provider/security-boundary changes require central security handling, not backlog cleanup.
Open contributor PR is superseded by a hydrated, merged canonical fix for the same reported failure.
Distinct API/compatibility PR requiring maintainer review; no duplicate or supersession action is justified.
Focused message-delivery/display fix with passing proof; keep open as an independent PR.
Distinct browser race fix linked to an open issue; keep open rather than close or merge in this plan-only inventory shard.
Focused logging/session-state fix with linked open issue; keep open as an independent PR.
